meaning: adj.(英国政治哲学家)霍布斯的 霍布斯哲学的
examples: The Hobbesian citizen is not likely to be a risk-taker, like George Washington or Andrew Carnegie.
Your letter continues mining this Hobbesian vein.
Will not even a Hobbesian society again? Require fire departments?
But those kinds of decisions are going to set off a sort of Hobbesian war of all-against-all within the Democratic coalition.
When you hear the term Hobbesian, you think of people at each other's throats, struggling for power in a situation of chaos.
